not_found: ❌ User with ID `{id}` not found in the ban list.
error: ❌ An error occurred while trying to unban the user: {error}
no_permission: ❌ You do not have `Ban Members` permission to use this command.
missing_arg: ❌ Please provide the ID of the user you want to unban. Ex: `{prefix}unban <user_id> [reason]`
